MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Vedica Puri, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Rosa Acevedo is present in Pro-Per.
Spanish interpreter Victor Magallanes appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Lisabeth Flores is present.
Laura Chiera representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of September 10, 2007 remains on calendar.
